arabicGreetings.meaning: Peace and mercy of Allah upon you
In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful

onboardingMessages.title: Gentle Welcome
onboardingMessages.message:
It's a blessing to have you here.

Every heart meets the Qur'an in its own way — through seeking, returning, reflecting, or teaching. However your path began, Tafsir Simplified is here to walk beside you, gently guiding you toward understanding and connection.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Choose the path that feels like yours:

onboardingMessages.title: Journey-Focused
onboardingMessages.message: Every journey with the Qur'an begins in a different place — some with questions, some with longing, others with years of study. Wherever you are, Tafsir Simplified will walk beside you, at your pace, with the tone and guidance that best fit your path.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Take a moment to choose the journey that feels closest to your heart:

onboardingMessages.title: Warmth & Invitation
onboardingMessages.message:
We're truly glad you're here.

Every journey with the Qur'an is unique — some are just beginning, others are deepening, and some are guiding others along the way. Tafsir Simplified will walk with you at your own pace, helping you connect with the meanings of the Qur'an in the way that speaks most to you.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Choose the path that reflects your journey:

onboardingMessages.title: Sacred Connection
onboardingMessages.message:
Your presence here is a gift.

The Qur'an speaks to each heart differently — sometimes with gentle whispers, sometimes with profound clarity, and sometimes with transformative power. Let us help you discover the voice that resonates with your soul.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Select the path that honors where you are today:

onboardingMessages.title: Personal & Intimate
onboardingMessages.message:
Thank you for trusting us with your journey.

Whether you're taking your first steps with the Qur'an, returning after time away, or deepening decades of study — this is your space. We've designed Tafsir Simplified to meet you exactly where you are, with the kindness and depth you need.

onboardingMessages.title: Hopeful & Encouraging
onboardingMessages.message:
We're honored you chose to begin here.

The Qur'an is a living guide — it meets you in joy and in hardship, in questions and in certainty. Tafsir Simplified is here to help those sacred words come alive for you, in whatever way your heart needs most.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Choose the companion for your journey:

onboardingMessages.title: Reflective & Poetic
onboardingMessages.message:
Every soul arrives here for a reason.

Some come searching. Others come remembering. Some arrive with notebooks, others with tears. The Qur'an has room for all of it — for every question, every longing, every revelation. Let us help you hear what it's saying to you.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Where does your heart stand today?

onboardingMessages.title: Dignified & Respectful
onboardingMessages.message:
Your journey with the Qur'an is sacred — and so is this moment.

Whether you're discovering these verses for the first time or returning to them after years of study, know that you belong here. Tafsir Simplified exists to serve your understanding, honor your pace, and meet you with the depth or simplicity you need.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: How would you describe your relationship with the Qur'an today?

onboardingMessages.title: Conversational & Warm
onboardingMessages.message:
We're so glad you're here.

The Qur'an has a way of meeting people right where they are — whether that's curiosity, devotion, study, or teaching. Our goal is simple: help you connect with its meanings in a way that feels personal, meaningful, and true to your journey.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Let's start by understanding where you are:

onboardingMessages.title: Minimalist & Reverent
onboardingMessages.message:
Thank you for being here.

The Qur'an is a gift — one that reveals itself differently to each person. Whether you're beginning your journey, continuing it, or teaching others, Tafsir Simplified will walk with you, offering the guidance you need at the depth that serves you best.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Where are you in your journey?

onboardingMessages.title: The Journey Begins
onboardingMessages.message:
Each heart travels its own path toward the words of Allah.

Whether you're just starting or deepening your study, we'll help you learn with sincerity and peace.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Choose the path that feels right for you:

onboardingMessages.title: The Tranquil Companion
onboardingMessages.message:
The Qur'an calls to every soul in its own way.

We're here to help you listen deeply, reflect sincerely, and grow gently.

onboardingMessages.title: The Calm Scholar
onboardingMessages.message:
Knowledge is light, and every light begins with intention.

Let's shape your learning experience around your goals — with balance, clarity, and purpose.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Where would you like to begin?

onboardingMessages.title: The Devotional Tone
onboardingMessages.message:
Every moment spent seeking understanding is an act of worship.

We're honored to be part of your journey toward the Qur'an's light.
onboardingMessages.callToAction: Choose the path that draws you closer:

new_revert.name: New Revert
new_revert.description: Starting fresh with an open heart
new_revert.longDescription: Gentle guidance with warmth, patience, and encouragement for those beginning their Islamic journey

curious_explorer.name: Curious Explorer
curious_explorer.description: Exploring the Quran with an open mind
curious_explorer.longDescription: Thoughtful and reflective interpretations for those drawn to explore spiritual meaning and wisdom

practicing_muslim.name: Practicing Muslim
practicing_muslim.longDescription: Balanced reflections for steady spiritual growth and daily connection

student.name: Islamic Studies Student
student.longDescription: Comprehensive tafsir grounded in authentic sources for academic learning

advanced_learner.name: Advanced Learner
advanced_learner.longDescription: Detailed analysis with advanced insights and classical commentary for deep understanding
